Name: DC Power Adapter
Description: Provides 12V DC power for each individual IP camera.

Name: Reader Illumination LED
Description: First white navigation light, powered by 12V via driver.

Name: Power Decoupling Capacitor
Description: Large electrolytic capacitor placed across the power lines (5V and GND) near the LED strip power input to smooth power fluctuations and prevent voltage drops during high current draws, protecting the strip and ESP32.

Name: Reader Sensitivity Potentiometer
Description: Measures the angular position of the thumb proximal joint.

Name: Main Base Plate
Description: Flat acrylic sheet serving as the primary structural base for all components, providing a stable platform.

Name: Thermal Receipt Printer
Description: Compact thermal printer for printing text and graphics on receipt paper.

Name: Feed Spool Dowel Rod
Description: Dowel rod for holding the feed spool.

Name: Take-Up Spool Dowel Rod
Description: Dowel rod for holding the take-up spool.

Name: Plexiglass Strip Guides
Description: Cut pieces of acrylic sheet used as tape guides.

Name: Optical Reader Alignment Bracket
Description: 3D printed bracket to hold the single optical reader sensor and illumination LED in precise alignment over the paper path.
